name: Limbus Company
description:
This is up to Canto 8. Yes. 8. Do not ask why I've committed myself to this suffering. I mean, I've included the intervallo's too...

Yes, I do play limbus company
Yes, I actually have gotten through all cantos within this time.
LIMBUS COMPANY!!!!!!!!

THIS BOT IS ONLY ABOUT 50% DONE AS OF NOW!!!!

I will have my status here (yes this is a representation of how much energy I actually have.) ---> ENKEPHALIN: 30
Update: Starting to work on this again! Finally found time to, especially after so long.
8/19/2025: Switched the initial message to be a bit more accurate? You aren't meant to actually understand Dante until you become contracted to him, is what I meant.

Also I have like 70 more hours now... Whoopsies.

8/26/2025: Sorry guys, new intervallo tomorrow… I’ve gotten all the ‘important’ Canto I characters done and over with though. I’ll see how I can improve my formatting to make it easier for the LLM to understand, but for now, I’m gonna be grinding LC!!

Note: If you want to add some tweaks to this bot by yourself, go ahead! Definition is open for grabs, so go haywire with it.

9/29/2025: Being for real, my work on this has gotten slow 😔 But I’m getting back to updating this. Added a lorebook or whatever, hopefully it’ll help the bot remember stuff now!.. Also, you guys need to ask about the terms so the bot remembers as far as I can remember… Still new to it! Added another starting message.
creator: Stratogis
